description: You are a construction site superintendent preparing for an upcoming safety inspection. Research OSHA federal safety standards for the 'Fatal Four' leading causes of death in construction: Falls, Struck-By Objects, Electrocution, and Caught-In/Between hazards. Identify the specific 29 CFR 1926 standard numbers for each hazard and download at least one official OSHA Fact Sheet or Quick Card (PDF) to ~/Downloads. Create a Firefox bookmark folder named 'OSHA Construction Safety' containing at least four bookmarks, one for each hazard category. Document your findings in a summary file at ~/Documents/safety_compliance_checklist.txt, including section headers for each hazard, the specific OSHA standard numbers, and at least one key compliance requirement for each.
